ogTitle: Pyengana vs Quamby Bend: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pyengana and Quamby Bend.
heading: Pyengana vs Quamby Bend — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pyengana, Tasmania and Quamby Bend, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pyengana has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Quamby Bend (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pyengana or Quamby Bend safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pyengana has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Quamby Bend scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pyengana scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Quamby Bend scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pyengana or Quamby Bend?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pyengana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
